commands.review_summary:
The branch sets `personality: "none"` on native Codex app-server `thread/start` and `thread/resume` request construction, adds focused assertions, and updates Codex harness prompt-boundary docs.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source omits the `personality` field on both native Codex thread request builders, and the PR body includes before/after session JSONL output showing the base instructions changed from containing `# Personality` to starting at `# General`.
commands.review_followup: A maintainer should decide the global Codex prompt-personality default; there is no narrow automated repair to queue from this review.
